column96: ALS was on my father's side of the family, They worked on farms.   My Mother at 72 years and my oldest brother at 49 died of pancreatic cancer which doctors thought was the result of herbicides and pesticides on the farm in southern Alberta.  Having been on HRT for 9 years, I believe this has caused liver damage NAFLD because the hormones were not balanced (1992 - 2001) due to ignorance of doctors.   I feel the Chem Trails in our skies also attribute to brain diseases due to the use of presence of aluminum and barium etc.  Mercury in the body due to dental fillings and its presence in the air due to coal burning that is used for making electricity in Alberta.
